prompt: Add 'Water the tomato planters' for tonight, and tell me which section of the Today list it will show up in. Reply JSON {"section": "<lowercase>"}.
paraphrases: Put 'Water the tomato planters' on for this evening — which part of Today will the user see it under? JSON {"section": "..."}.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Water the tomato planters' AND status=0 AND trashed=0 AND start=1 AND startDate=132807168 AND startBucket=1

pseudoScript: things todo add "Water the tomato planters" --when evening
